_comment_models: Where the face-age AI stores its downloaded model files. Point this at the drive with room (e.g. your external HD).
_comment_detection: How many years apart 'apparent age' and 'expected age' must be before a photo is flagged as suspicious. 6 is a safe default that catches big mistakes (baby vs teen) without nagging on small ones.
_comment_confidence: A date guess is treated as 'certain' (and may move files automatically) only when the apparent age across photos agrees within this many years. Otherwise it waits for your review.

organize._comment: Filing photos into dated folders on the drive.
